section_order: Immersive Hero -> Philosophy/Methodology -> Bespoke Solutions -> Case Studies -> Refined CTA -> FAQ
cta_placement: Floating action button after scroll depth 30%; secondary CTA in nav
color_strategy: Dark mode hero transitioning to clean light mode sections
effects: Text reveal on scroll; parallax case study images
conversion_tips: Sell the methodology and exclusivity before showing any service tiers; use client logos as trust signals
mobile_strategy: Stack sections vertically; sticky CTA bar at bottom

section_order: Cinematic Video Hero -> Asymmetric Feature Grid -> Craftsmanship Details -> Editorial Story -> Buy/Inquire
cta_placement: Sticky bottom bar on mobile; inline after craftsmanship section
color_strategy: Strict monochrome allowing product imagery to pop
effects: Image scaling on scroll; hover zoom on products
conversion_tips: Use massive high-res imagery; hide secondary details behind sleek accordions; one product per viewport on mobile
best_for: Fashion luxury goods watches jewelry abaya
mobile_strategy: Full-bleed images; swipe gallery; bottom sheet for details

section_order: Aurora Hero with CTA -> Logo Bar -> Bento Feature Grid -> How It Works -> Pricing -> Testimonials -> Final CTA
cta_placement: Primary CTA in hero and final section; pricing page CTA in each tier
color_strategy: Gradient hero transitioning to white; accent color for CTAs only
effects: Feature cards animate in on scroll; pricing toggle animation
conversion_tips: Show ROI or time-saved stats in hero; keep pricing visible (no contact us); reduce form fields to minimum
mobile_strategy: Collapse bento to single column; hamburger nav; persistent bottom CTA

section_order: Full-screen Device Mockup Hero -> Problem/Solution -> Feature Highlights -> Social Proof -> Download CTA -> Press Mentions
cta_placement: Hero CTA + floating download button after fold; app store badges
color_strategy: Dark or bold background with app screenshots providing color
effects: 3D device rotation; parallax app screens; counter stats
conversion_tips: Show the app in action immediately; lead with the transformation not the tool; app store ratings as trust
mobile_strategy: Phone mockup fills screen; gesture-hint animations; app store deep links

section_order: Kinetic Typography Hero -> Selected Work Grid -> Process/About -> Testimonials -> Contact
cta_placement: Contact CTA visible after 2 projects; floating email button
color_strategy: Monochrome with single accent; let project imagery provide color
effects: Project thumbnails expand on hover; smooth page transitions; text animations
conversion_tips: Lead with your best 3-4 projects; show process not just results; include specific metrics/outcomes
mobile_strategy: Horizontal scroll for projects on mobile; swipe interactions

section_order: Countdown Hero -> Speakers Grid -> Schedule Timeline -> Venue/Map -> Ticket CTA -> Sponsor Logos
cta_placement: Sticky ticket CTA in header; prominent after speaker and schedule sections
color_strategy: Bold primary color for urgency; dark hero with event photography
effects: Countdown timer animation; speaker card flip on hover; schedule timeline
conversion_tips: Create urgency with early-bird pricing; show speaker credentials prominently; social proof from past events
mobile_strategy: Single-column schedule; collapsible day sections; mobile wallet ticket

section_order: Bold Statement Hero -> Value Proposition (3 bullets) -> Social Proof Count -> Single Email Input -> Thank You
cta_placement: Single inline form in hero; that's it — one page one action
color_strategy: Minimal — two colors max; bold typography carries the weight
effects: Typing animation in input placeholder; success confetti; subscriber count
conversion_tips: Radical simplicity; one form field (email only); show subscriber count; promise specific value not generic updates
mobile_strategy: Form fills viewport; virtual keyboard aware input positioning

section_order: Lookbook Hero -> Filter/Sort Bar -> Product Grid -> Editorial Break -> More Products -> Newsletter CTA
cta_placement: Add to cart on hover; sticky filter bar; cart icon with count
color_strategy: Neutral backgrounds letting product photography dominate
effects: Quick-view modal; image swap on hover; smooth filter transitions
conversion_tips: High-quality consistent photography; show lifestyle and detail shots; keep filters minimal and relevant
mobile_strategy: Bottom navigation; pull-to-refresh; infinite scroll with loading skeleton

section_order: Aerial Video Hero -> Search/Filter Bar -> Featured Listings -> Neighborhood Guide -> Virtual Tour CTA -> Agent Contact
cta_placement: Search bar in hero; floating contact agent button; tour CTA on each listing
color_strategy: Sophisticated dark header with warm interior photography contrast
effects: Map integration; smooth image gallery transitions; 360 tour embed
conversion_tips: Lead with the lifestyle not the listing; show neighborhood amenities; virtual tour as differentiator
mobile_strategy: Map-first mobile view; swipe listing cards; click-to-call agent

section_order: Welcome Modal -> Empty State with CTA -> Guided Tour Tooltips -> Sample Data -> First Success Moment
cta_placement: Progressive CTAs guiding through setup; celebrate first completion
color_strategy: Brand primary for active elements; muted for incomplete; green for success
effects: Progress bar animation; tooltip spotlight; confetti on completion
conversion_tips: Reduce time-to-value; pre-fill sample data; celebrate micro-achievements; never show an empty screen
mobile_strategy: Step-by-step wizard; bottom sheet tooltips; haptic feedback on completion
